ai_summary: **Executive Summary: Betadrugs Limited Preferential Issue Proceeds**  Betadrugs Limited confirmed no deviation in the use of proceeds from its Rs 117.01 crore Preferential Issue for the quarter ending June 30, 2026, utilizing approximately 41% of the funds towards original stated objectives. This adherence to planned usage, verified by the Audit Committee and a monitoring agency, indicates strong financial governance and presents no immediate red flags regarding fund misallocation, although a substantial portion of the funds remains unspent.
